name: daily-fresh gate honors the per-profile freshness window override when configured
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/pr-corpus/last-fetch profiles && printf '2026-05-13T00:00:00Z\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/pr-corpus/last-fetch/cfpb.txt && printf 'pr_corpus_freshness_window: 1h\n' > profiles/p.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/freshness-status.sh" --source cfpb --now 2026-05-13T02:00:00Z --profile profiles/p.yaml 2>out.txt && grep -q 'window=1h' out.txt && grep -q 'is_fresh=false' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
